scenarios.description: isFormSubmittable() returns true for known formSubmit tag via valueOf(tagName,settings) overload
scenarios.expectedResult: true for select tag obtained via valueOf(String, ParseSettings)

scenarios.description: isFormSubmittable() returns false for unknown tag when preserveTagCase triggers clone path
scenarios.expectedResult: false for cloned unknown tag with preserveTagCase=true
pseudocode: Tag tag = Tag.valueOf(tagName, normalName, ns, settings);

scenarios.description: isFormSubmittable() returns false on known but non-submittable tag (formatAsInlineTags list)
scenarios.expectedResult: false for span tag from static setup with formSubmit=false
pseudocode: // 'span' is inline and not in formSubmitTags
